title: AnchorPoint
description: Saves your coordinates on logout so you can share your location or return safely.
body:
# AnchorPoint - Save your location on logout

![Display your joined worlds joined as a clean list, with the ability to favorite your most important worlds which sends it to the top of the list. Filter your worlds via a sidebar, in which you can switch between Singleplayer and Multiplayer worlds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d687404fcf9e2fa9e4975311b48f074645b1f264_0.webp)

**AnchorPoint** lets you organise, browse, and manage your folders and entries directly in-game with a clean, Minecraft-native interface.  
It’s built for fast navigation, clear selection, and minimal friction, whether you’re opening details, filtering content, or managing favourites.

AnchorPoint focuses on interaction quality rather than feature bloat, aiming to feel like it belongs in vanilla Minecraft while still offering powerful control.

## Features
- Search with include / exclude keywords
- Multi-select using Shift and Ctrl
- Double-click to open detail screens
- Favourite entries for quick access
- Folder filtering and sorting
- Lightweight, consistent UI
- Built-in settings screen

## Design Goals
- Fast and predictable interactions  
- No unnecessary clutter  
- UI that matches Minecraft’s visual language  
- Easy to extend and configure  

## Supported Platforms
AnchorPoint is currently only available for **Fabric** on Minecraft: Java Edition version **1.21.11, 1.21.10, 1.21.9**.


## License

**Allowed:**
* Use the mod freely
* Include the unaltered .jar in modpacks
* Record and monetize videos or streams featuring the mod (with a link to the official project page)

**Not allowed:**
* Modify, remix, or fork the mod
* Redistribute modified versions
* Re-upload or mirror the .jar file on other sites

Distribution is permitted only via official project pages (e.g. Modrinth, CurseForge).
